Data.Comments: COMPANY SWITCHED MOVING COMPANIES WITHOUT INFORMING HER. ACTUAL MOVE WENT VERY WELL DRIVER AND CREW WERE WONDERFUL.
IT WAS FINE JUST AN OKAY MOVE.
EVERYTHING WENT VERY WELL. DRIVER AND CREW DID A GREAT JOT THEY ONLY CONCERN WAS THAT THE CREW ASKED HIM TO BUY LUNCH BUT NEVER PAID HIM BACK. OTHERWISE GOOD MOVE.

THE SURVEYOR UNDERESTIMATED THE SIZE OF THIS MOVE. THE CSR WAS GREAT WITH FOLLOW-UP. DRIVER AND CREW WERE GREAT VERY NICE TO WORK WITH. HOWEVER THEY ARE STILL WAITING FOR A MISSING PART TO THE WORK BENCH.
MOVE WENT OKAY. BOXES WERE NOT LABELED CORRECTLY WHICH CAUSED PROBLEMS WITH THE UNPACKING CREW WHO DID A POOR JOB. DRIVER DID A GOOD JOB THOUGH AND THE CSR WAS GREAT TO WORK WITH.

THE MOVE WAS GREAT. EVERYTHING WENT VERY WELL. THEY DID HAVE A FEW MINOR SCRATCHES ON THEIR FURNITURE BUT BESIDES THAT IT WENT WELL. THE DRIVER AND HIS CREW DID AN EXCELLENT JOB. THERE CSR WAS ALSO VERY HELPFUL AND DID A GOOD JOB.
MOVE WENT WELL DRIVER AND CREW WERE VERY NICE. CSR WAS EXCELLENT TO WORK WITH VERY HELPFUL. THEY HAD SOME ISSUES WITH THE 3RD PARTY SERVICE BUT EVERYTHING ELSE WENT VERY SMOOTH.
MOVE WENT WELL. THEY ARE PLEASED WITH EVERYTHING.
DRIVER WAS EXCELLENT EVERYONE WAS VERY PROFESSIONAL.
MOVE WENT WELL CREW AT ORGIN WAS TERRIBLE THEY WERE NOT CAREFUL AT ALL. DRIVER WAS GREAT THOUGH. CSR WAS A LITTLE HARD TO GET A HOLD OF.
COULD NOT BE HAPPIER IT WAS AN EXCELLENT MOVE!
MOVE WENT VERY WELL. THEY DID HAVE PROBLEM WITH THE WASHER AND DRYER BUT THAT HAS ALREADY BEEN TAKEN CARE OF.
MOVE WENT VERY WELL. HE WAS PLEASED WITH EVERYTHING.
MOVE WENT GREAT VERY HAPPY WITH EVERYTHING.

MOVE WENT PRETTY WELL. THE DRIVER DID AN EXCELLENT JOB! THE CREW DID NOT PACK AS WELL AS HE THOUGHT THEY SHOULD HE DID HAVE SOME DAMAGE. THERE WAS DAMAGE TO THE HOUSE AS WELL. OVERALL STILL PLEASED WITH THIS MOVE.
EVERYONE WAS GREAT TO WORK WITH THE OVERALL PROCESS IS A LITTLE FRUSTRATING THOUGH.
THEY HAD SOME MINOR DAMAGES BUT NOW HAS REALIZED THAT THE TWO GRANDFATHER CLOCKS WERE NEVER CHECKED AND ARE NOT WORKING PROPERLY. HE WILL BE FILING A CLAIM ON THOSE NOW.
THE MOVE WENT GREAT! THEY ARE VERY HAPPY WITH EVERYTHING.
HE WAS VERY PLEASED WITH EVERYTHING - NOT ONE PROBLEM.

IT WAS A WONDERFUL MOVE! HE WAS VERY PLEASED WITH EVERYTHING. DRIVER AND CREW DID A GREAT JOB! HE DID HAVE SOME DAMAGE BROKEN SHELF AND LOST THE KEYES TO HIS TOOL BOX BUT HE IS STILL HAPPY WITH THIS MOVE.
SURVEYOR DID NOT CALL FOR ENOUGH BOXES. THERE WAS MISCOMMUNICTION WITH THE CSR. DRIVER AND CREW DID NOT PACK CAREFULLY ENOUGH HAD TOO MANY DAMAGED ITEMS.
THE MOVE WENT WELL. THE DRIVER AND CREW DID A GOOD JOB. THEIR CSR WAS VERY HELPFUL AND SUFFICIENT THROUGHOUT THE MOVE. HE DID NOT HAVE ANY PROBLEMS AND WAS PLEASED.
EVERYTHING WAS GOING OKAY UNTIL THEY POINTED OUT THE DAMAGE DONE TO THE HOUSE TO THE DRIVER. HE BECAME UPSET AND ACTED VERY UNPOFESSIONAL. HE IS NOT SURE IF HE WOULD USE NELSON WESTERBERG AGAIN.
THE MOVE WENT VERY WELL. THEY HAVE NO COMPLAINTS ABOUT ANYTHING.

OVERALL THEY ARE HAPPY WITH THE MOVE BUT THE PACKING CREW COULD OF DONE A MUCH BETTER JOB. ITEMS WERE JUST THROWN INTO BOXES THEY DID HAVE SOME DAMAGE. THE CREW WERE VERY NICE GUYS BUT COULD OF BEEN MORE CAREFUL.
MOVE WENT VERY WELL!
MOVE WENT WELL DRIVER AND CREW WERE VERY FRIENDLY. THE ONLY COMPLAINT THEY HAD WAS THEIR FURNITURE WAS DAMAGED.

THE MOVE WENT WELL EXCEPT FOR THE DRIVER. HE HAD A VERY BAD ATTITUDE AND WAS VERY UNPROFESSIONAL. EVERYONE ELSE DID A GREAT JOB THOUGH. HE WOULD USE NELSON WESTERBERG AGAIN ONLY IF HE COULD USE A DIFFERENT DRIVER.
MOVE WENT GREAT NOTHING WAS BROKEN!
MOVE WENT VERY WELL. DRIVER WAS GREAT BUT PACKING CREW WAS VERY LATE AND RUSHED THROUGH THE PACKING LOTS OF BROKEN ITEMS.
THE MOVE WENT JUST WONDERFUL VERY HAPPY WITH EVERYTHING.
MOVE WENT OKAY. HE FELT THAT EVERYONE DID AN AVERAGE JOB BUT NOTHING SPECIFICALLY WENT WRONG.
HE WAS PLEASED WITH EVERYONES PERFORMANCES ( HE DOESNT TYPICALLY GIVE EXCELLENTS )
EVERYTHING WENT GREAT! HE IS STILL UNPACKING BUT SO FAR NOTHING HAS BEEN DAMAGED.
DRIVER WAS EXCELLENT. THERE WAS DAMAGE TO THE GRANDFATHER CLOCK BUT OVERALL VERY HAPPY WITH THIS MOVE.
MOVE WENT VERY WELL. DRIVER AND CREW DID A GREAT JOB.
MOVE WENT WELL. A LITTLE OVERWHELMING AT DESTINATION THOUGH. THE CREW WAS TRYING TO UNPACK BUT THERE WAS NO WHERE TO PUT THINGS.
GOOD MOVE HE ESPECIALLY LIKE THE DRIVER. DRIVER WAS INCONTACT WITH HIM THROUGH OUT THE WHOLE MOVE. CSR WAS JUST AVERAGE.
MOVE WENT WELL. VERY HAPPY WITH THE SERVICE THEY RECEIVED. DESTINATION CREW WAS REALLY GREAT!
GREAT MOVE! THEY HAVE MOVED SEVERAL TIMES BEFORE AND THIS WAS THE BEST MOVE YET! THEY WERE VERY HAPPY WITH THE DRIVER AND CREW. PART OF THE BEDROOM SET WAS DROPPED AND DAMAGED BUT STILL A GREAT MOVE.
THE MOVE ITSELF WENT VERY WELL BUT THEY WERE 4 DAYS LATE. SHE WAS LIVING IN A HOTEL FOR ALMOST A WEEK. DRIVER AND CREW DID A GREAT JOB THOUGH.
CSR WAS DIFFICULT TO GET IN CONTACT WITH BUT SHE CALLED FREQUENTLY SO THERE WERE NOT ANY PROBLEMS. DRIVER AND CREW WERE WONDERFUL.
BEST MOVE THEYVE EVER HAD!
EVERYTHING WENT VERY WELL.
DRIVER AND CREWS WERE VERY NICE AND UNDERSTANDING. THEY DID HAVE SOME DAMAGE TO THE COUCH AND WALLS BUT STILL FEELS THAT IS AS A GREAT MOVE.
HAD MANY LITTLE ITEMS DAMAGED BUT NOTHING WORTH FILING A CLAIM ON. OVERALL STILL A GREAT MOVE.
MOVE WENT WELL THEY DID HAVE SOME DAMAGE BUT OVERALL IT WAS A PRETTY GOOD MOVE.

THEY LIKED THE DRIVER AND CREW BUT DID HAVE A LOT OF DAMAGE. THE BABY GRAND PIANO TREADMILL AND EXPENSIVE VASE WERE ALL DAMAGED. THE CSR WAS HORRIBLE TO WORK WITH SHE COULD NEVER GET AHOLD OF HER POOR COMMUNICATION. SHE STILL RATED THE OVERALL MOV

SOME OF THE CRWE WAS GREAT BUT OTHER MEN DID NOT DO SO WELL. SOME BOXES WERE MISLABLED. HIS WIFE IS VERY ALLERGIC TO SMOKE AND EVEN THOUGH THE MEN SMOKED OUTSIDE SHE COULD STILL SMELL IT ON THEIR CLOTHES. IT GOT SO BAD AT ONE POINT THAT SHE HAD TO LE
BEST MOVE OUT OF THE LAST 5 MOVES! DRIVER WAS TERRIFIC CREW DID A GREAT JOB TOO. HE WAS VERY PLEASED WITH EVERYTHING.
DRIVER WAS THE BEST HES EVER HAD. COULD NOT SAY ENOUGH NICE THINGS ABOUT HIM. CSR AND CREWS WERE NICE TOO EVERYONE DID AN WONDERFUL JOB.
GREAT MOVE - COULD NOT HAVE GONE ANY BETTER!
MOVE WENT FINE BUT HE IS VERY UPSET OVER THE MASTER BED FRAME GETTING DAMAGED.
GREAT MOVE! DRIVER AND CREW DESERVE PERFECT 10S! COULD HAVE USED A FEW MORE GUYS TO HELP PACK BUT STILL A GREAT MOVE.

Data.Claim_x003F_: YES- JEWELRY CASE WITH WEDDING RINGS IS LOST
Data.Comments: THEY HAVE HAD TWO PREVIOUS MOVES WITH NELSON WESTERBERG THAT WENT VERY WELL BUT THEY WERE VERY DISAPPOINTED IN THIS ONE. THEIR JEWELRY BOX WAS STOLEN WITH VALUABLES IN IT.
MOVE WENT VERY WELL. ONLY PROBLEM THEY HAD WAS THEY HEARD GLASS BREAK WHILE THE DRIVER WAS PACKING GLASSES BUT HE DID NOT BRING IT TO THEIR ATTENTION. OTHERWISE GREAT MOVE!

DRIVER WAS NOT PROFESSIONAL AT ALL HE COMPLAINED THE WHOLE TIME. DRIVER AND CREW DISAPPEARED TO GO EAT LUNCH. BILLING WAS CONFUSING TOO. PHYSICAL PART OF MOVE WENT FINE BUT RELATIONSHIP PART WAS HORRIBLE.
GOOD MOVE! DRIVER LOST A FEW THINGS BUT CREW WAS EXCELLENT. OVERALL HE WAS VERY HAPPY WITH THIS MOVE.
THE CSR WAS IN CONTACT WITH HER THE ENTIRE TIME. EVERYONE WAS SO NICE AND COURTEOUS.
THIS WAS AN EXCELLENT MOVE. HE DID NOT HAVE ANY COMPLAINTS ABOUT ANYTHING. EVERYONE DID A WONDERFUL JOB AND WAS VERY HELPFUL WITH EVERYTHING. THE DRIVER AND HIS CREW WERE GREAT.
MOVE WENT GREAT! THEY ARE VERY HAPPY WITH EVERYTHING.
THE CREWS WERE REALLY GOOD BUT HE DID HAVE TO FILE TWO CLAIMS AND NOW REALIZES HE NEEDS TO FILE A FEW MORE.
EXCELLENT MOVE! WOULD LIKE A DEBRIS PICKUP IF POSSIBLE.

THE MOVE WENT WELL. THE ONLY PROBLEM SHE HAD WITH THEIR CSR WAS THAT SHE DID NOT GIVE THEM SPECIFIC TIMES THAT THE DRIVER AND CREW WERE SUPPOSE TO ARRIVE. THEREFORE SHE HAD TO WAIT AROUND ALL DAY FOR THEM. THE DRIVER AND HIS CREW WERE INCREDIBLE THOUGH.
MOVE WENT WELL BUT HE FELT THAT THE CREWS WERE NOT ATLAS CREWS ( WOULD NOT RATE THEM ). HE HAS NOT BEEN REIMBURSED FOR ALL THEIR DAMAGES EITHER.
MOVE WENT WELL BUT PACKING AND UNPACKING CREWS COULD HAVE BEEN BETTER. THEY SEEMED TO BE RUSHED AND DID NOT LABEL THINGS CORRECTLY. DRIVER DID A GREAT JOB THOUGH.
MOVE WENT GREAT! THEY WOULD LIKE A DEBRIS PICKUP IF POSSIBLE.
MOVE WENT VERY WELL VERY HAPPY WITH EVERYTHING.
MOVE WAS SUPERB! VERY HAPPY WITH EVERYTHING.
MOVE WENT VERY WELL NO PROBLEMS NO COMPLAINTS! HE WAS VERY HAPPY WITH EVERYTHING.
EVERYTHING WENT VERY WELL. HE HAD NO COMPLAINTS ABOUT ANYTHING!
IT WALL WENT GREAT VERY HAPPY WITH EVERYTHING.
GREAT MOVE! EVERYTHING WENT VERY WELL.
IT WAS A PERFECT MOVE!
MOVE WENT WELL BUT HE HAD SOME DAMAGE AND IS STILL WAITING ON THE CLAIM INFO. HE WOULD OF RATED MOVE AS EXCELLENT IF IT WERENT FOR THE DAMAGE / CLAIMS. DRIVER AND CSR WERE VERY HELPFUL
MOVE WENT VERY WELL. THE DRIVER DID A GREAT JOB! THEY ARE STILL UNPACKING SO FAR NOTHING WAS DAMAGED.
HE WAS VERY HAPPY WITH THIS MOVE.
EVERYONE WORKED FAST AND WERE VERY FRIENDLY. THEY DID HAVE A CHAIR THAT WAS BADLY DAMAGED THOUGH. WOULD LIKE SOMEONE TO PICKUP THE EMPTY BOXES.
MOVE WENT PRETTY WELL. EVERYONE DID A GOOD JOB. THEY DID NOT HAVE ANY SPECIFIC PROBLEMS.
DRIVER AND CREW DID A REALLY GOOD JOB. THEY WERE ALL NICE AND VERY HELPFUL. SHE IS VERY HAPPY WITH EVERYTHING.
GREAT MOVE! HE WAS VERY PLEASED WITH HOW SMOOTH EVERYTHING WENT.
GREAT MOVE! DRIVER DID AN EXCELLENT JOB. THEY DO HAVE ITEMS IN STORAGE STILL BUT SO FAR NOTHING WAS BROKEN.

Data.Claim_x003F_: YES - LAMP AND DESK WERE DAMAGED
Data.Comments: PACKING CREW WAS NOT GENTLE WITH HIS THINGS AND DID NOT PACK VERY WELL. HE DID NOT FEEL THAT THE CSR COMMUNICATED VERY WELL EITHER. DEST CREW DID A GREAT JOB. OVERALL MOVE WAS OKAY.
MOVE WENT VERY WELL A LAMP WAS BROKEN BUT EVERYTHING ELSE WENT FINE.
THE MOVE WENT VERY WELL THEY ARE VERY HAPPY WITH EVERYTHING. THEY DID HAVE A FEW MINOR CLAIMS BUT STILL HAPPY WITH THIS MOVE.
EVERYTHING WENT JUST FINE!
NO PROBLEMS AT ALL GREAT MOVE!
MOVE WENT VERY WELL. CSR DID A GREAT JOB. THEY ARE STILL UNPACKING BUT SO FAR NOTHING WAS DAMAGED.
GREAT MOVE! EVERYTHING WENT VERY WELL EXCEPT THEY DID HAVE SOME DAMAGE. A COFFE TALBE AND FILING CABINETS WERE DAMAGED. DRIVER AND CREW WERE VERY FRIENDLY AND PROFESSIONAL.
THE MOVE WENT WELL THEY ARE STILL UNPACKING NOT SURE IF ANYTHING WAS DAMAGED YET.
EVERYTHING WENT VERY WELL. THEY HAVE COME ACROSS A FEW BROKEN ITEMS BUT THEY ARE STILL UNPACKING.
DRIVER AND CREW WERE OKAY CONSIDERING THE COLD WEATHER BUT HERE WERE A FEW "HIC-CUPS" ALONG THE WAY. MOVE COULD HAVE GONE MUCH SMOOTHER.
EVERYTHING WENT JUST FINE. DID HAVE TO FILE ONE CLAIM BUT OVERALL STILL HAPPY WITH THIS MOVE.
EXCELLENT MOVE EVERYONE WAS FRIENDLY AND PROFESSIONAL!
HAS MOVED A NUMBER OF TIMES BEFORE AND THIS WAS THE BEST ONE SO FAR.
DRIVER AND CREW DID A GREAT JOB. THIS WAS A REALLY GOOD MOVE!
MOVE WENT VERY WELL EXCEPT ONE OF THE CREW MEMBERS SLIPPED AND PUT HIS KNEE THROUGH THE CURIO CABINET.
THE MOVE WENT VERY WELL. THE PACKERS DID NOT ALWAYS PACK THINGS VERY WELL AND THEY HAD A FEW ITEMS BROKEN. BESIDES THAT THE MOVE WENT VERY WELL AND THEY ARE PLEASED WITH EVERYTHING.
EVERYONE DID A GOOD JOB.
HAS MOVED 3 TIMES BEFORE AND THIS WAS THE BEST YET. THE CREW WAS GREAT THEY WERE VERY CONSCIENTIOUS ABOUT PACKING. THEY WERE VERY PLEASED WITH EVERYTHING.
THE MOVE WENT WELL. HE WAS PLEASED WITH EVERYTHING. THE CSR DID A GREAT JOB. SHE WAS VERY HELPFUL AND KEPT HIM WELL INFORMED.
GOOD MOVE. BOXES WERE NOT LABELED VERY WELL BUT OTHERWISE NO PROBLEMS.
THE TRUCK BROKE DOWN ON THE WAY AND ENDED UP BEING 4 DAYS LATE EVERYTHING WENT FINE ONCE IT ARRIVED. HE STILL HAS ITMES IN A MINI STORAGE BUT SO FAR NOTHING BROKEN.
GOOD MOVE! THE DESTINATION CREW WAS NOT VERY PROFESSIONAL OR POLITE BUT STILL A GOOD MOVE.
IT WAS A GOOD MOVE BUT COULD HAVE BEEN BETTER.
EVERYTHING WENT VERY WELL! EVERYTHING WENT VERY WELL. DID NOT HAVE ANYTHING UNPACKED THOUGH.
GREAT MOVE! DRIVER AND CREW DID A GREAT JOB.
THE MOVE WAS WONDERFUL THE DRIVER AND CREW WERE SUPER NICE TOO.
EVERYONE WAS FATASTIC THEY COULD NOT HAVE ASKED FOR A BETTER MOVE! VERY PLEASED WITH EVERYTHING.
MOVE WENT VERY WELL THEY ARE HAPPY WITH EVERYTHING.
THEY WERE VERY IMPRESSED WITH HOW WELL THIS MOVE WENT. THE DRIVER AND CREW WERE VERY QUICK BUT VERY GOOD.
THE MOVE WENT GREAT VERY PLEASED WITH EVERYTHING.
EVERYTHING WENT GREAT THEY DID HAVE A LAMP THAT WAS BROKEN BUT IT WAS NOT WORK FILING A CLAIM ON.
MOVE WENT VERY WELL EVERYONE DID A GREAT JOB! "NO COMPLAINTS"
EVERYONE DID A GREAT JOB! NOT ONE COMPLAINT.
EVERYTHING WENT GREAT! ONE OF THEIR BEST MOVES EVER.

THE MOVE WENT VERY WELL. THE DRIVER AND CREW DID AN INCREDIBLE JOB WITH THE MOVE. THEY WERE ALL VERY HELPFUL WITH EVERYTHING. THE ONLY PROBLEM THEY HAD WAS THAT THE TRUCK BROKE DOWN DURING THE MOVE. BESIDES THAT EVERYTHING WAS GREAT.
EVERYTHING WENT VERY WELL. HE WAS VERY PLEASED WITH EVERYONES PERFOMANCES. EVERYONE WAS FRIENDLY AND HELPFUL. HE DID HAVE SOME MINOR DAMAGE BUT STILL HAPPY WITH THIS MOVE.

THEY LOVED EVERYONE FROM NELSON WESTERBERG BUT HAS HAD PROBLEMS WITH THE 3RD PARTY SERVICE. THEY DID NOT SEEM TO KNOW WHAT WAS GOING ON AND HOOKED UP THE REFRIDGERATOR WRONG - IT LEAKED ALL OVER THE FLOOR.
THE MOVE WENT PRETTY WELL VERY HAPPY.

Data.Claim_x003F_: YES - DAMAGE TO FURNITURE AND BROKEN GLASSWARE
Data.Comments: DRIVER WAS WONDERFUL. HE WAS VERY FLEXIBLE AND CONGENIAL. HE HAS MOVE FIVE TIMES BEFORE AND THIS WAS THE BEST SO FAR!
PACKING CREW DID NOT PACK THINGS VERY CAREFULLY. A LOT OF BOXES WERE MISLABLED TOO. STILL A GOOD MOVE THOUGH.
DRIVER AND CREW COULD OF DONE A LITTLE BETTER JOB BUT OVERALL STILL A GOOD MOVE.
